sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30363" key="e)gko/lpios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκόλπ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30363.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on the bosom</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διδόναι τι ἐ. τῷ ἀέρι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
